title: Baked Cod à la Française
description: A French-inspired dish featuring cod baked with pasta and a hint of Portuguese flavors.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
Rinse cod fillets under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
Season cod with Portuguese sea salt.
In a baking dish, arrange cooked pasta, then place cod fillets on top.
Drizzle with olive oil and melted butter.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until cod is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
